failures.description: The agent misread or misused the catalog search results and answered with the second, more expensive smartphone instead of the cheapest available smartphone.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The relevant tool output was available before the failure: ProductCatalogSearch returned two available Smartphones sorted by price ascending, with item 5339029584 at $1128.99 before item 1507389580 at $1157.86. At index 4, the Executor synthesized the answer as item 1507389580 at $1157.86, which contradicts the tool result and selects the more expensive item. This is not an invalid tool invocation, unsupported intent, or underspecification; the needed evidence was present and the agent reasoned incorrectly from it.
